---
title: "Reference"
execute:
  echo: false
  warning: false
  message: false
  comment: ""
---

This page renders the current CLI help by running the built `ir` executable during the Quarto render.

```{r}
ir_executable <- function() {
  env_bin <- Sys.getenv("IR_BIN", unset = NA_character_)
  if (!is.na(env_bin) && nzchar(env_bin)) {
    if (file.exists(env_bin) && file.access(env_bin, 1) == 0) {
      return(normalizePath(env_bin, mustWork = TRUE))
    }
    stop("`IR_BIN` does not point to an executable file: ", env_bin, call. = FALSE)
  }

  local_builds <- file.path("..", "target", c("debug", "release"), "ir")
  local_builds <- local_builds[file.exists(local_builds) & file.access(local_builds, 1) == 0]
  if (length(local_builds) > 0L) {
    return(normalizePath(local_builds[[1]], mustWork = TRUE))
  }

  stop(
    "`IR_BIN` is not set and no local `ir` build was found. ",
    "Run `cargo build` or set `IR_BIN` to the executable to document.",
    call. = FALSE
  )
}

cli_help <- function(...) {
  stopifnot(
    requireNamespace("fansi", quietly = TRUE),
    requireNamespace("htmltools", quietly = TRUE),
    requireNamespace("knitr", quietly = TRUE)
  )

  args <- c(..., "--help")
  ir_bin <- ir_executable()
  old_options <- options(cli.num_colors = 256L)
  on.exit(options(old_options), add = TRUE)

  output <- system2(
    ir_bin,
    args,
    stdout = TRUE,
    stderr = TRUE,
    env = c("CLICOLOR_FORCE=1", "CLICOLOR=1")
  )
  status <- attr(output, "status")

  if (!is.null(status)) {
    stop(
      "`", ir_bin, " ", paste(args, collapse = " "), "` failed with status ", status,
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  output_text <- paste(output, collapse = "\n")
  if (
    length(output) < 3L ||
      !grepl("Usage:", output_text, fixed = TRUE) ||
      !grepl("Options:", output_text, fixed = TRUE)
  ) {
    stop(
      "`", ir_bin, " ", paste(args, collapse = " "), "` produced incomplete help output.",
      call. = FALSE
    )
  }

  output <- htmltools::htmlEscape(output)
  output <- fansi::sgr_to_html(output, term.cap = "256")
  knitr::asis_output(paste0(
    "<pre class=\"ir-cli-help\"><code>",
    paste(output, collapse = "\n"),
    "</code></pre>\n"
  ))
}
```

## `ir`

```{r}
cli_help()
```

## `ir run`

```{r}
cli_help("run")
```

## `ir render`

```{r}
cli_help("render")
```

## `ir tool`

```{r}
cli_help("tool")
```

## `ir tool run`

```{r}
cli_help("tool", "run")
```

## `ir tool install`

```{r}
cli_help("tool", "install")
```

## `ir cache`

```{r}
cli_help("cache")
```

## `ir cache dir`

```{r}
cli_help("cache", "dir")
```

## `ir cache clean`

```{r}
cli_help("cache", "clean")
```
